---
output: github_document
---



```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse  = TRUE,
                      comment   = "#>",
                      fig.path  = "man/figures/",
                      out.width = "100%")
```



CycloClust: cyclical-time-constrained clustering <img src="man/figures/package-sticker.png" align="right" style="float:right; height:120px;"/>
=========================================================


[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/CycloClust)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=CycloClust)
[![R CMD Check](https://github.com/NicoDjegh/CycloClust/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/NicoDjegh/CycloClust/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
[![Website](https://github.com/NicoDjegh/CycloClust/actions/workflows/pkgdown.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/NicoDjegh/CycloClust/actions/workflows/pkgdown.yaml)
[![License: GPL (>= 2)](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-GPL%20%28%3E%3D%202%29-blue.svg)](https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-2.0/)





## Introduction

WORK IN PROGRESS!
`CycloClust` provides ecologists with ways to perform hierarchical cyclical-time-constrained clustering on multidimensional data for the study of regular ecological rhythms such as seasons, days, or tides.
The package largely piggy-backs on function `constr.hculst` by P. Legendre and G. Guénard implemented in package [`adespatial`](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/adespatial/index.html).



## Functions

`CycloClust` provides functions to obtain, describe and visualize clusters constrained in cyclical time with the following set of  functions:
|`cycloClust()`| Performs the clustering by calling `constr.hclust` and applying a cyclical time constraint|
|`cyclicPosition()`| Computes the position of clusters in cyclical time (start, end, mean, and range of each cluster for each cycle)|

Some additional functions are called within the package but may be valuable to users:
|`circ.mean()`| Computes circular (i.e. cyclical) means|
|`linearize.circ.ts`| Linearizes a circular time series|

## Installation

NOT READY!!! You can install the development version from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

```{r eval=FALSE}
## Install < remotes > package (if not already installed) ----
if (!requireNamespace("remotes", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("remotes")
}

## Install < CycloClust > from GitHub ----
remotes::install_github("NicoDjegh/CycloClust")
```


## Get started

For an overview of the main features of `CycloClust`, please read the 
[Get started](https://NicoDjegh.github.io/CycloClust/articles/CycloClust.html)
vignette.

## Citation

Please cite `CycloClust` as: 

> Djeghri Nicolas (`r format(Sys.Date(), "%Y")`) CycloClust: cyclical-time-constrained clustering. R package version 0.0.0.9000. 
<https://github.com/NicoDjegh/CycloClust/>


## References

+ Guénard, G. and P. Legendre. 2022. Hierarchical clustering with contiguity constraint in R. Journal of Statistical Software 103(7): 1-26 (https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v103.i07)
